name: Pothos GraphQL
description: Pothos GraphQL — CI/CD for Applications tool for developers. Specializes in GraphQL Framework.

seo.title: Pothos GraphQL Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score

review.verdict: Pothos GraphQL is a Developer Portals / API Management tool.
pros: Centralizes API governance, docs, and rate limiting
cons: Adds an extra network hop and operational layer
review.best_for: Enterprises exposing APIs to partners or public
